_enabled: Master switch — when false, this plugin is skipped during indexing and HTML files fall through to the generic text indexer.
_extensions: File extensions this plugin claims (lower-case, leading dot).
_max_file_size_bytes: Skip HTML files larger than this many bytes (default 5 MB).
_extract_code_blocks: Index `<pre><code>` and `<script type="text/x-…">` blocks as `code_block` nodes.
_extract_meta: Pull `<meta>` and `<title>` into a single `frontmatter`-style node.
_extract_imports: Capture `<script src>`, `<link href>` and similar asset references as imports.
_asset_tags: Map of HTML tag name → URL attribute. Drives which tags `extract_imports` walks and which attribute holds the asset URL.
_extract_comments: Extract `<!-- TODO -->`-style HTML comments as comment nodes.
_comment_tags: Tags surfaced as comment nodes when `extract_comments` is true.
_ignore_dirs: Folder names the indexer skips when this plugin is enabled (static-site generators' build outputs, framework caches).
_ignore_files: Glob patterns for files the indexer should skip.
_ignore_dir_markers: Sentinel file names that mark an entire directory as ignorable.
